message:
refactor(checkpoint): harden path validation, add multi-window layout support, and improve scrollback diffing

Major security and correctness improvements to the checkpoint subsystem:

Path traversal hardening:
- Add validateExistingDirectoryPath() to reject symlink-based path traversal
  attacks on session and checkpoint directories
- Add resolveExistingCheckpointArtifactPath() to validate artifact files are
  regular files (not symlinks/devices) before reading
- Replace direct filepath.Join with safe resolution throughout storage, export,
  integrity, and restore code paths
- Add checkpointDirForLookup() for read-only directory resolution without
  mutation side effects

Multi-window session layout support:
- Add WindowLayoutState type and WindowLayouts field to SessionState for
  per-window layout capture and restoration
- Implement getSessionWindowLayouts() to capture individual window layouts
  via tmux list-windows
- Add canUseLegacyLayoutFallback() to gracefully degrade to single-layout
  mode for single-window sessions
- Implement applyWindowLayouts() in Restorer for per-window layout application
- Add moveInitialWindow() to handle window index alignment during restore
- Add validateSessionWindowLayouts() for checkpoint validation
- Add legacyLayoutFromWindowLayouts() and sortWindowLayouts() helpers

Export/import improvements:
- Include session.json as a separate artifact in exports for independent
  session state verification
- Add maxImportEntrySize limit and readImportEntryLimited() for OOM protection
- Add duplicate archive entry detection during import
- Extract verifyImportChecksums() and validateImportedSessionState() for
  cleaner import validation
- Include git status file in exports when available
- Fail loudly on missing artifact files instead of silently continuing
- Add rewriteCheckpointForExport() consolidating path rewriting logic

Incremental checkpoint improvements:
- Use NewCapturerWithStorage() so temp checkpoints share the diff storage
  backend and cleanup properly via defer
- Add loadPaneScrollback() with graceful handling of panes that have no
  scrollback file and zero scrollback lines
- Improve computeScrollbackDiff() to use largest suffix/prefix overlap
  algorithm, correctly handling rollover-truncated scrollback buffers
- Add equalStringSlices() and containsContiguousSlice() helpers
- Change GitChange.Branch from string to *string for proper omission
- Add WindowLayouts and ActivePaneID to SessionChange

Integrity verification:
- Add VerifyStoredCheckpoint() for verifying checkpoints directly from disk
  without requiring full Storage.Load()
- Add validateLoadedCheckpointMetadata() for cross-checking loaded metadata
  against requested session/checkpoint identifiers
- Add session.json consistency checking (metadata vs file contents)
- Improve error messages with formatArtifactCheckError()

Storage additions:
- Add HasCheckpointPath() for existence checks without full loading
- Add LoadGitPatch() and LoadPaneScrollback() for safe artifact access
- Add sessionWindowIndexesFromPanes(), cloneWindowLayouts(), and PaneCount
  computed field to Checkpoint type
- Add GitStatusFile constant and StatusFile field to GitState

Extensive test coverage additions across all changed functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
